summary: CORS allowlist verification complete. All 15 tests PASSED (9 CORS header behavior + 5 regression + 1 env-var source check). The new env-configurable allowlist echoes back exact origins for prod (mindtrackjourney.com, www.mindtrackjourney.com), regex-matches Emergent preview + *.mindtrackjourney.com subdomains, allows local dev (localhost:3000), and correctly omits Access-Control-Allow-Origin for blocked origins and http-scheme apex. Preflight OPTIONS from allowed origin returns 200 with POST allowed and Content-Type + Authorization allowed; preflight from blocked origin is rejected with HTTP 400. Regression suite confirms /api/health, /api/auth/login (admin creds), /api/auth/me, /api/catalog/symptoms, and /api/music/requests round-trip all still return 200. Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true is set on allowed responses (no wildcard + credentials anti-pattern remains).

test_results.name: Blocked http scheme against https-only regex
Preflight OPTIONS from allowed origin
test_results.detail: HTTP 200; ACAO echoed; allow-methods includes POST; allow-headers includes Content-Type and Authorization

test_results.name: GET /api/catalog/symptoms
test_results.detail: 200, dict of disorder -> symptom list (note: response is a mapping, not a list)

test_results.name: POST /api/music/requests round-trip
test_results.detail: 200 with request_id; DELETE returned non-fatal status

test_results.name: CORS_ORIGINS and CORS_ORIGIN_REGEX read from os.environ
test_results.detail: server.py:2431 uses os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS'); server.py:2437 uses os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGIN_REGEX', ...)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2466 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into modules (auth, music, catalog, subscription, cors config) in a future iteration. Not blocking CORS verification.

CORS regex allows any *.emergentagent.com subdomain (including hypothetical malicious ones like attacker.emergentagent.com). If Emergent controls the entire zone this is acceptable, otherwise consider narrowing to *.preview.emergentagent.com.

The env-override pattern for CORS_ORIGINS unions defaults with env values (dedup via dict.fromkeys) — good; there is no way to *remove* a default origin via env. Consider adding a CORS_ORIGINS_MODE=replace|append toggle if that's ever needed.
seed_data_creation: None. Test 14 creates a music request keyed by TEST_ prefix message and attempts DELETE cleanup (best-effort).
context_for_next_testing_agent: CORS suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_cors.py and is fast (~0.4s). Reuse it as regression when touching middleware config. Note that /api/catalog/symptoms returns a dict-of-disorder→symptom-list, not a plain list; /api/music/requests returns {ok, request_id} on POST.
rca_of_issue: N/A — verification-only task. The new allowlist behaves per CORS spec: exact-match origins are echoed, regex-match origins are echoed, non-match origins have ACAO omitted. Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true is now valid because ACAO is a concrete origin instead of '*'.
